summary: HR Phase 2 Attendance System - Complete e2e testing PASSED. Found and FIXED a critical bug in backend where employee_name, employee_nik, and department_name were stored as null in attendance records. Backend APIs: 100% pass. Frontend UI: All components working.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Employee data (name, nik, department) stored as null in attendance records
fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: Incorrect field mapping - code used 'employee_id' instead of 'nik', 'full_name' instead of 'name', 'department_name' instead of 'department'
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated field mappings: nik -> employee_nik, name -> employee_name, department -> department_name. Also added 'nik' to employee lookup queries.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: hr_attendance.py line 186-189 - Changed employee field mappings to use 'nik', 'name', 'department' instead of non-existent fields
FIXED: hr_attendance.py line 132, 277, 411, 450 - Added 'nik' field to employee lookup queries for better compatibility
FIXED: hr_attendance.py line 477-479 - Updated get_employee_attendance response to use correct field names
seed_data_creation: Created test attendance records for ANTONIUS OTU and SALWA NUR AMELIA during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Attendance Phase 2 complete. All 6 API endpoints tested: /today, /shifts, /checkin, /checkout, /report, /employee/{id}. Frontend HRAttendance.jsx at /hr/attendance route working. Note: There's also another attendance page at /absensi using Absensi.jsx with different UI.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/hr/attendance/today: PASS - Returns summary with total_employees, present, absent, late counts
backend_endpoints.GET /api/hr/attendance/shifts: PASS - Returns shifts list with REG shift (08:00-17:00)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/hr/attendance/checkin: PASS - Creates attendance record with employee data correctly stored
backend_endpoints.POST /api/hr/attendance/checkout: PASS - Updates attendance with check-out time and work hours
backend_endpoints.GET /api/hr/attendance/report: PASS - Returns date range report with summary statistics
backend_endpoints.GET /api/hr/attendance/employee/{id}: PASS - Returns employee attendance history with proper name mapping

frontend_components.page_load: PASS - Dashboard Absensi page loads at /hr/attendance
frontend_components.stats_cards: PASS - Total Karyawan, Hadir, Tidak Hadir, Terlambat, Rate Kehadiran displayed
frontend_components.checkin_modal: PASS - Employee select, method select, location input, notes input present
frontend_components.checkout_modal: PASS - Employee select, method select, location input, overtime input present
frontend_components.shifts_display: PASS - Regular Shift 08:00-17:00 shown in Jadwal Shift section
frontend_components.attendance_table: PASS - Table with NIK, Nama, Departemen, Check-In/Out, Jam Kerja, Status columns

bug_fix_details.issue: Attendance records stored employee_name, employee_nik, department_name as null even though employee data existed
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Field mapping mismatch between employees collection and attendance code - employees use 'nik', 'name', 'department' but code expected 'employee_id', 'full_name', 'department_name'
bug_fix_details.affected_records: Historical records before fix still have null values (expected - no data migration needed)
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Updated hr_attendance.py to use correct field names with fallback: employee.get('nik') or employee.get('employee_id'), employee.get('name') or employee.get('full_name'), etc.
bug_fix_details.verification: New check-in for SALWA NUR AMELIA correctly shows NIK=BJMS-SRU1-002, Name=SALWA NUR AMELIA, Department=SALES RETAIL
